student.name: Shivanandu K
student.bio: Google Summer of Code 2026 Contributor | Final Year B.Tech CS @ Srinivas University | Full-Stack Developer | Open Source Contributor

project.title: BLT-Rewards: Gamified Security Contributions with BACON Tokens
project.description: A complete security contribution gamification platform for OWASP BLT — featuring automated BACON token rewards via Solana & Bitcoin Runes, domain-specific achievement badges, severity-weighted leaderboards, a swag redemption marketplace, anti-gaming architecture, and an Education Bridge API. Built on Cloudflare Python Workers for sub-200ms global edge performance.
